floor_history.headline: fable-blitz deep recon: csmd4 IS marionation region-1's cheaper twin (no region-3) - the whole gap is the in-place-basin v1/a0 allocation-equation flip (pri(arg5) > pri(t0)); the wrap-weighting x in-p

Structural axis (decl order, s32/u32 narrow, statement re-assoc under arg5-after-t0) closed directly on csmd4: 4/4 masked-INERT at 2, head-order flip regresses to 7 - twin's structural closure confirm

frontier.hypothesis: Differential do-while(0) wrap around the arg5 chain ONLY (not the whole window) lifts arg5-qty loop-weighted refs so pri(arg5) > pri(t0) strictly, flipping the v1/a0 exchange in the h5 or ip basin.
frontier.mechanism: flow.c loop-depth-weighted REG_N_REFS feeds local-alloc.c qty_compare; do-while(0) emits NOTE_INSN_LOOP_BEG (sanctioned 2026-07-06 do-while-zero-exception.md). Structural sweep result reinforces this is now the ONLY untried differentiator on the h5 base.
frontier.next_probe: Insert `do { v0 = idx_1494[1]; v0 <<= 2; arg5 = *(s32*)(v0+(s32)tbl_125c); } while (0);` as the arg5-chain wrap; sandbox --disable all + QTYDBG on the gccdbg cc1 (rebuild recipe memory/wip/cpu_side_move_dir_4/notes.md:88-91) to confirm arg5 qty refs lift and whether the exchange flips.

frontier.hypothesis: Multi-set arg5 value-staging via a DIFFERENT single-set carrier that survives cse's fold precondition (not the v0-carrier which regressed to 12 in rejected/arg5_split_multiset_v0.c).
frontier.mechanism: cse.c copy-propagation folds single-set reg sources; needs a carrier that is either legitimately multi-set for a non-cheat reason, or whose use-shape breaks the fold precondition even at single-set.
frontier.next_probe: Sweep {arg5 = v0-then-mask-with-0xFFFFFF, arg5 via idx-return-value re-use, arg5 threaded through cnt-carrier (cnt is dead here after do_timeout)} on the ip base; check whether the fold survives and arg5's qty gains the ref.

frontier.hypothesis: The residual v1/a0 exchange on the ip basin has an a0-block from the fmt-la scheduled before t0's last use (twin marionation 6g finding (b)); fmt-la-late via cse-defeat (not source-level respelling which is INERT per rejected/fmt_la_late_local.c) closes the exchange.
frontier.mechanism: GCC 2.7.2 cse.c equiv_constant folds symbol addresses regardless of C staging; the lui/addiu selection is post-CSE. Only a construct that hides the symbol from equiv_constant (function-argument-passed constant, opaque tail-call) would move it.
frontier.next_probe: Prototype an opaque-carrier: pass &D_800161C8 through a volatile assign that GCC can't fold (`static void *volatile fmt_hold = &D_800161C8;` + read at call site), verify equiv_constant NO longer sees the constant at the call, sandbox.
